title: NCL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1607 Graduate, Diploma, Trade Apprentice Posts
organization: Northern Coalfields Limited (NCL), Singrauli, Madhya Pradesh
department: HRD Department, Northern Coalfields Limited (A subsidiary of Coal India Limited)
post_name: Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice, Trade Apprentice (ITI), Paramedical Apprentice
short_info: Great opportunity for Graduate, Diploma, ITI, and Paramedical candidates from UP/MP to join Northern Coalfields Limited, Singrauli as Apprentice Trainees for one year under the Apprentice Act 1961. Apply online through NATS/NAPS portals from 01-06-2026 to 15-06-2026.

application_fee.details: There is no application fee mentioned in the notification. Candidates apply online through the NATS/NAPS government portals. No paper-based application will be accepted.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on the cut-off date 01-06-2026. Candidates must have been born on or between 01-06-2000 and 01-06-2008 (i.e. minimum 18 years and maximum 26 years). Standard age relaxations are applicable only for reserved category slots.

qualification.education_qualification: As prescribed discipline-wise; obtained through Full-time Regular course only. Qualifications via Part-time/Correspondence/Distance Learning are not eligible.
qualification.experience: Candidates who have undergone Apprenticeship earlier, are currently pursuing Apprenticeship Training, or have 1 year or more of job experience are summarily ineligible.
qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date, i.e. 01-06-2026. Candidature is provisional and subject to verification of original documents before joining.

vacancy_details.Discipline of Apprentice Training: Diploma in Modern Office Management & Secretarial Practices
ITI Computer Operator and Programming Assistant

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Degree in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Mechanical Engineering from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Computer Science Engineering / Information Technology from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Mining Engineering from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Communication Engineering from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Civil Engineering from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Degree in Information Technology from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)

vacancy_details.Discipline: Bachelor of Commerce / Arts / Law / BCA
vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Degree in B.Com / BA / LLB / BCA respectively from recognized University/Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Diploma in Business Management / Financial Accounting / Computerized Accounting / Accounting & Taxation / Finance from recognized Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Diploma in Mining Engineering / Mining & Mine Surveying / Mine Surveying from recognized Institute (Full-time Regular course)

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Diploma in respective Engineering discipline from recognized Institute (Full-time Regular course)
Diploma in Electronics / Electronics & Communication / Telecommunication / Industrial Electronics from recognized Institute (Full-time Regular course)

vacancy_details.Discipline: Diploma in Modern Office Management & Secretarial Practices
vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Diploma in Modern Office Management / Secretarial Practices from recognized Institute (Full-time Regular course)

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Matriculation (10th) + ITI Certificate in respective trade with National/State Trade Certificate in that trade
Matriculation (10th) + ITI Certificate in Electrician (Auto) Trade with National/State Trade Certificate in Auto Electrician Trade
Matriculation (10th) + ITI Certificate in COPA Trade

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Matriculation (10th) + ITI Certificate in respective trade

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Degree in respective Paramedical discipline + Valid registration certificate of respective state

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Diploma in respective Paramedical discipline + Valid registration certificate of respective state

category_wise_vacancy.Discipline: Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology / Pharmacy / ECG Technology / General Nursing & Midwifery / X-Ray Technology / Ophthalmic Technology

salary_details.pay_scale: Graduate Apprentice: Rs. 12,300/- | Diploma Apprentice: Rs. 10,900/- | Trade Apprentice (ITI): Rs. 9,600/- to Rs. 10,560/- | Paramedical Graduate: Rs. 13,700/- | Paramedical Diploma: Rs. 12,700/-

selection_process: Selection will be made purely on the basis of merit drawn from qualifying examination marks
followed by document scrutiny and a mandatory medical test. No written examination will be conducted by NCL for this recruitment.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only. Graduate and Diploma Apprentice candidates must first enrol on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in and Trade Apprentice candidates must enrol on the NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in. After successful registration, a registration number (Enrolment ID) will be generated, following which the candidate must apply for the NCL positions through the respective portal.
Documents/Details required at the time of Online Application:
Scanned colour photograph and scanned signature in black ink (as per portal specifications).
important_instructions: Online applications are open from 01-06-2026 to 15-06-2026 through NATS/NAPS portals only. A candidate may apply for any one notified position only - multiple applications will lead to disqualification. Information pertaining to Date of Birth, Caste Category, and Qualification once entered in the online application shall be considered final - no alteration will be permitted at later stages. Stipend for Graduate and Diploma Apprentices is inclusive of the Government of India share paid through DBT; Trade Apprentice stipend will be paid directly by NCL. Stipend will be paid directly into the AADHAAR-linked bank account of the Apprenticeship Trainee as per the signed contract. Apprenticeship Training is purely temporary and statutory in nature - it does not confer any right or claim for regular employment in NCL. Apprentices are eligible for 11 days Casual Leave and 15 days Medical Leave per year of training. Engagement hours are between 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Apprentices will be covered under the Workmen Compensation Act, 1923 for any accident during training. No accommodation, fooding/lodging, or transport will be provided during the training period. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in document scrutiny or post-scrutiny processes. Canvassing in any manner at any stage will lead to cancellation of candidature. Any dispute will be subject to courts/tribunals of Singrauli, MP only. Dates mentioned in the notification are tentative and subject to alteration/amendment.
